transcription.text: I fell in love with you the first time I looked into them there eyes, and you have a certain little cute way of flirting with them there eyes. Sparkle, bubble, get you in a whole lot of trouble, I'm looking for the boy with the whispered eyes. I fell in love with them there eyes. I'm looking for the boy with the whispered eyes.
